title: Copy and Paste Bulk Address Information
excerpt: Does anyone know how I can copy the data from one column to another column ? I have a Text column containing address information and I want to copy this data to a Location column. I can copy 1 cell at a time, but I have …

posts.author: antonygarnett (Antony)
posts.cookedHtml:
Does anyone know how I can copy the data from one column to another column ? I have a Text column containing address information and I want to copy this data to a Location column. I can copy 1 cell at a time, but I have hundreds of rows that I wish to do.
Many thanks, Antony

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @antonygarnett,

At this time it is only possible to copy individual cells into the location column. I apologise for the setback here! I encourage you to submit this request via our Submit an Idea section to increase visibility and votes for future development

posts.author: misty_shadow (misty_shadow)
posts.cookedHtml:
Antony:

Does anyone know how I can copy the data from one column to another column ? I have a Text column containing address information and I want to copy this data to a Location column. I can copy 1 cell at a time, but I have hundreds of rows that I wish to do.
Many thanks, Antony

Hi Antony,

You can export the board to Excel, copy the column values, and then paste them back into all items on the board using this app: Column Bulk Paste

11920×960 74.8 KB

posts.author: AnishJ (Anish)
posts.cookedHtml:
misty_shadow:

You can export the board to Excel, copy the column values, and then paste them back into all items on the board using this app: Column Bulk Paste

Yes I know that use Copy & Paste Column app
